name: Small Wood Crate Christmas Decorative Storage Bin Red - Brightroom™
description:
From toys to office supplies, keep your items organized and your space clean with this Small Wood Crate Decorative Storage Bin from Brightroom™. Made of wood, this red decorative storage bin adds a pop of color to your space, while the open top allows you to easily store and access the contents. Designed in a rectangular shape, this 481.95-cubic-inch storage bin is great for keeping books, small throws and much more. Plus, it features cutout handles for easy portability.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
